summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Supply Review Control Tower. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working with all features functional.

issues: React console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - likely due to duplicate product IDs in database. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Supply Review dashboard correctly calculates pricing_integrity percentage (57% = 8 using engine / 14 total with vendor_cost)
Margin settings correctly loaded from category_margin_rules: target=30%, min=15%
Products with vendor_cost but no sell_price correctly flagged as 'critical'
Products below minimum margin correctly flagged as 'warning'
Approve-pricing endpoint correctly applies pricing engine and validates minimum margin
Override prices below minimum are auto-adjusted with warning message
React key warning in console is due to products with null/duplicate IDs - minor issue
seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST_ prefixed products from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supply Review Control Tower fully tested. Stats: 24 pending, 6 pricing issues, 48 missing data, 0 healthy. Pricing integrity at 57% (8 using engine, 6 not). All filters working (All, Pricing Issues, Missing Data, Pending, Ready to Approve). Approve action panel shows pricing preview with Base Price, Expected Sell Price (30% margin), Min Sell Price (15% margin), Current Sell Price. Override & Approve validates minimum margin. Reject flow with reason input working.

backend_api_tests: test_review_dashboard_includes_stats - PASSED (total, pending, pricing_issues, missing_data, healthy)
frontend_ui_tests: Supply Review page loads at /admin/vendor-supply-review - PASSED
Pricing Integrity banner shows 57% with engine/non-engine counts - PASSED
KPI strip shows Pending (24), Pricing Issues (6), Missing Data (48), Healthy (0) - PASSED
5 filter buttons (All, Pricing Issues, Missing Data, Pending, Ready to Approve) - PASSED
Table columns: Product, Base Price, Sell Price, Margin, Source, Health, Data, Status, Actions - PASSED
Approve button opens action panel with pricing preview - PASSED
Action panel shows Base Price, Expected Sell Price, Min Sell Price, Current Sell Price - PASSED
Override & Approve with price input and reason fields - PASSED
Reject button opens panel with rejection reason input - PASSED
Health legend (Critical, Warning, Healthy) displayed - PASSED

review_dashboard_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/vendor-supply/review-dashboard returns products with pricing_health flags, stats, pricing_integrity, and margin_settings

filter_functionality.details: All 5 filters work correctly: All, pricing_issues (critical/warning only), missing_data (products with missing fields), pending (draft/pending_review), ready (healthy + complete + pending)

approve_pricing_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/vendor-supply/products/{id}/approve-pricing sets status=active, applies pricing engine with 30% target margin. Override prices validated against 15% minimum margin.

frontend_ui.details: Supply Review page displays pricing integrity banner, KPI strip, filter buttons, product table with all required columns, and action panels for approve/reject
